title: BEM-673 verify hourly
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {'parse_error':True,'raw':p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

def exists(path):
    return Path(path).exists()

state=load('governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json')
runtime=read('governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md')
delivery=read('governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_delivery.md')
queue_active=list(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').glob('*.json')) if Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').exists() else []
processed=list(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed').glob('*curator_hourly_report_once*')) if Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed').exists() else []
status_file=read('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/curator_hourly_report_once.status')
response_file=read('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/curator_hourly_report_once.response.json')

has_table='№  | Наименование' in runtime and 'Краткая суть' in runtime and 'Статус' in runtime
no_raw='Последние события' not in runtime and 'bem665_' not in runtime and 'bem668_' not in runtime
sent=isinstance(state,dict) and state.get('telegram_delivery')=='sent'
dispatch_204=status_file.strip()=='204'
queue_clean=len(queue_active)==0
archived=len(processed)>0
hourly_status=state.get('status') if isinstance(state,dict) else None
checks=[
 {'name':'dispatch_status_204','pass':dispatch_204,'evidence':'governance/workflow_dispatch_results/curator_hourly_report_once.status'},
 {'name':'queue_archived','pass':archived,'evidence':'governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/'},
 {'name':'active_queue_empty','pass':queue_clean,'evidence':'governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/'},
 {'name':'hourly_state_exists','pass':isinstance(state,dict),'evidence':'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json'},
 {'name':'telegram_delivery_sent','pass':sent,'evidence':'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json'},
 {'name':'operator_table_present','pass':has_table,'evidence':'governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md'},
 {'name':'raw_events_removed','pass':no_raw,'evidence':'governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md'}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='canonical_hourly_delivered' if not failed else 'canonical_hourly_not_confirmed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'CANONICAL_HOURLY_NOT_CONFIRMED','failed':failed,'status_file':status_file,'response_preview':response_file[:500] if response_file else None,'hourly_state':state,'delivery_report':delivery[:500]}
result={'schema_version':'canonical_hourly_dispatch_and_delivery_verification.v1','bem':'BEM-673','status':status,'checks':checks,'dispatch_status':status_file,'active_queue':[str(x) for x in queue_active],'processed_matches':[str(x) for x in processed],'hourly_state':state,'runtime_preview':runtime[:1200],'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 18:59 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem673_verify_canonical_hourly_dispatch_and_delivery.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem673_verify_canonical_hourly_dispatch_and_delivery.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-673 | Verify Canonical Hourly Dispatch And Delivery | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 18:59 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem673_verify_canonical_hourly_dispatch_and_delivery','cycle_id':'bem673-verify-canonical-hourly-dispatch-and-delivery','source':'monitor','status':status,'dispatch_status':status_file,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 18:59 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem673_verify_canonical_hourly_dispatch_and_delivery']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'dispatch_status':status_file,'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['operator_telegram_report_delivery_status']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 18:59 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem673_verify_canonical_hourly_dispatch_and_delivery.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-673 '+status.upper()+' dispatch_status='+str(status_file)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Verified dispatch status, queue cleanup, Telegram delivery state, and operator-readable canonical hourly report table')
"""
No issue comments.
